about.title: About Us
about.text: Park Station @ Park Chair is your café in the heart of Cair Park — a place to refresh among nature, for families, friends, and gatherings. From Turkish coffee and iced coffee to slushies and mini pancakes, we're here every day from 10:00 AM to midnight.
